scenario.context: Station 04 of the day run: project planning and economic efficiency.
scenario.mission: You plan work packages and milestones, estimate effort, and compare cost with benefit for a customer project.

station.profile: Work packages, milestones, effort, economic efficiency
constraints: Structure planning in a traceable way

customerRequest.subject: Station 04: Planning and economic efficiency
customerRequest.body: Please plan the customer project in a traceable way, estimate the effort for the main work packages, and make the economic impact transparent.

questions.title: Build a robust plan
questions.prompt: What is most important for a robust project plan?

options.text: Define work packages, milestones, effort, and risks in a traceable way

feedback.correct: Correct: This is how a robust plan becomes transparent and usable.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: A viable plan needs structure, effort, and risk visibility.

questions.title: Assess economic efficiency
questions.prompt: Which points belong in a sound economic efficiency assessment? (Multiple choice)

options.text: Compare alternatives with advantages and disadvantages
Choose only by the lowest price
options.rationale: Misses project goals and risk exposure.

feedback.correct: Correct: Economic efficiency is evaluated on a sound basis.
feedback.wrong: Partly wrong: Please evaluate benefit, risk, and assumptions together.

questions.title: Structure the planning flow
questions.prompt: Put the flow from scope to approved planning in order.

feedback.correct: Correct: The planning flow is logically structured.
feedback.wrong: Not ideal: Please move from scope via effort and risk to documented approval.

questions.title: Calculate total planning cost
questions.prompt: Analysis costs 1260 EUR, implementation 3420 EUR, testing 980 EUR, and documentation 540 EUR. What is the total amount?

feedback.wrong: Please add all planning components correctly.

questions.title: Summarize economic efficiency briefly
questions.prompt: Write a short economic efficiency note in 4-6 sentences with cost-benefit picture, risk, and recommendation.
questions.expectedOutline: Cost-benefit picture, relevant risk note, and a clear recommendation.

feedback.correct: Correct: The note is economically and professionally understandable.
feedback.wrong: Please make cost-benefit picture, risk, and recommendation more concrete.
